creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: amdmi3
Date: Thu Mar 24 15:34:43 UTC 2016
New revision: 411797
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/411797

Log:
  Cisco::CopyConfig provides methods for manipulating the
  running-config of devices running Cisco  IOS via  SNMP
  directed TFTP. This module is essentially a wrapper for
  Net::SNMP and the CISCO-CONFIG-COPY-MIB-V1SMI.my MIB schema.

  WWW: http://search.cpan.org/dist/Cisco-CopyConfig/

  PR:		208236
  Submitted by:	rihaz.jerrin@gmail.com

Changes:
  head/net-mgmt/Makefile
  head/net-mgmt/p5-Cisco-CopyConfig/
  head/net-mgmt/p5-Cisco-CopyConfig/Makefile
  head/net-mgmt/p5-Cisco-CopyConfig/distinfo
  head/net-mgmt/p5-Cisco-CopyConfig/pkg-descr
  head/net-mgmt/p5-Cisco-CopyConfig/pkg-plist
